g.text: Angle of Attack AND Stall Simulator
Push the pitch past 15° to trigger a stall.

span.style: background-color: #ef4444; color: white; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 15px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase;

div.p: The Angle of Attack (AoA) is the angle between the blade's chord line and the oncoming relative wind. As you increase AoA, lift increases—up to a point. If you exceed the Critical Angle (usually around 15°), the air can no longer smoothly follow the top curve of the blade. The airflow separates, becoming violently turbulent. This is a Stall: Lift drops dramatically, and drag instantly spikes!
